clientmount.name: ClientMount
clientmount.description: Grants permission to allow an NFS client read-access to a file system

clientrootaccess.name: ClientRootAccess
clientrootaccess.description: Grants permission to allow an NFS client root-access to a file system

clientwrite.name: ClientWrite
clientwrite.description: Grants permission to allow an NFS client write-access to a file system

createaccesspoint.name: CreateAccessPoint
createaccesspoint.description: Grants permission to create an access point for the specified file system

createfilesystem.name: CreateFileSystem
createfilesystem.description: Grants permission to create a new file system

createmounttarget.name: CreateMountTarget
createmounttarget.description: Grants permission to create a mount target for a file system

deleteaccesspoint.name: DeleteAccessPoint
deleteaccesspoint.description: Grants permission to delete a specified access point

deletefilesystem.name: DeleteFileSystem
deletefilesystem.description: Grants permission to delete a specified file system

deletefilesystempolicy.name: DeleteFileSystemPolicy
deletefilesystempolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the IAM resource policy for a specified file system

deletemounttarget.name: DeleteMountTarget
deletemounttarget.description: Grants permission to delete a specified mount target

getaccesspoint.name: GetAccessPoint
getaccesspoint.description: Grants permission to get resource information for a specified access point

getfilesystem.name: GetFileSystem
getfilesystem.description: Grants permission to get resource information for a specified file system

getfilesystempolicy.name: GetFileSystemPolicy
getfilesystempolicy.description: Grants permission to get the IAM resource policy for a specified file system

getmounttarget.name: GetMountTarget
getmounttarget.description: Grants permission to get resource information for a specified mount target

getsynchronizationconfiguration.name: GetSynchronizationConfiguration
getsynchronizationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to get a synchronization configuration for a specified file system

listaccesspoints.name: ListAccessPoints
listaccesspoints.description: Grants permission to get a paginated list of all access points in the account

listfilesystems.name: ListFileSystems
listfilesystems.description: Grants permission to get a paginated list of all file systems in the account

listmounttargets.name: ListMountTargets
listmounttargets.description: Grants permission to get a paginated list of all mount targets in the account

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a specified S3 Files resource

putfilesystempolicy.name: PutFileSystemPolicy
putfilesystempolicy.description: Grants permission to add an IAM resource policy to a specified file system

putsynchronizationconfiguration.name: PutSynchronizationConfiguration
putsynchronizationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to add a synchronization configuration to a specified file system

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to tag a specified S3 Files resource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to untag a specified S3 Files resource

updatemounttarget.name: UpdateMountTarget
updatemounttarget.description: Grants permission to update resource information for a specified mount target
